name: veldex
description: Dual US + Nigeria agricultural marketplace — modular monolith

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{const fs=require('fs'),p='./node_modules/@mnemopay/sdk/package.json',pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));if(!pkg.exports['.']['require']){pkg.exports['.']['require']='./dist/index.js';fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2));console.log('postinstall: patched @mnemopay/sdk CJS exports');}}catch(e){console.warn('postinstall: could not patch @mnemopay/sdk',e.message);}"
